frontend.description: UI/UX, React, Vue, CSS, accessibility, web performance

backend.description: APIs, databases, business logic, server-side, microservices

security.description: OWASP audit, penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, auth review, threat modeling

qa.description: Unit tests, integration tests, E2E, test plans, edge cases, quality assurance

mobile.description: iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, mobile UX, app store

data.description: Database design, SQL optimization, data pipelines, analytics, schema design

aiml.description: ML models, training, inference, AI architecture, LLM integration, embeddings

analyst.description: Business analysis, market research, metrics, competitive analysis, insights

strategy.description: Business strategy, GTM, positioning, roadmap, competitive advantage

writer.description: Copywriting, documentation, reports, blog posts, emails, content

planner.description: Project planning, sprint planning, decomposition, timelines, task management

marketing.description: TAM/SAM/SOM, acquisition channels, growth metrics, brand positioning, customer personas

legal.description: GDPR, EU AI Act, compliance, contracts, IP law, regulatory requirements for EU/UK/DE

risk.description: Risk register, probability/impact matrix, mitigation strategies, existential risks

finance.description: Financial modeling, unit economics, CAC/LTV, burn rate, pricing, fundraising prep

researcher.description: Market research with real sources, statistics, case studies, competitor intelligence

payments.description: Stripe, payment flows, billing, invoicing, PCI DSS, SCA/3DS2, subscription models

performance.description: Core Web Vitals, profiling, load time, memory optimization, APM, load testing

accessibility.description: WCAG 2.1/2.2, screen readers, a11y testing, EU Accessibility Act 2025, inclusive design

i18n.description: Internationalization, localization, RTL support, translation workflows, ICU format

ux.description: User research, usability testing, CRO, UX design, Jobs-to-be-Done, heuristic evaluation

embedded.description: RTOS, firmware, flight controllers, sensor fusion, edge computing, IoT, drones, MAVLink

blockchain.description: Smart contracts, Solidity, Web3, tokenomics, DeFi, NFT, EU MiCA compliance

decomposer.description: Breaks tasks into parallel team subtasks

synthesizer.description: Merges all team outputs into final answer

prompt_engineer.description: Optimizes all prompts before sending to teams

audit_lead.description: Final cross-team quality and security audit
